name: Pork Chops and Limas
recipeIngredient: 2 cans cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops in a large skillet.
2. Drain and cool the pork chops on paper towels.
3. Run cold water over the frozen lima beans to separate them (do not thaw them).
4. Mix together all ingredients except the pork chops, placing the mixture in a freezer bag.
5. Add the pork chops to the freezer bag and freeze.
6. When ready to serve, bake at 350°F for 1 hour, covered.
Summary of processes:
- Chop: 1 large apple
- Freeze in: large freezer bag
- Serve with: mashed potatoes (don't waste that good gravy) and spicy apple sauce.
